payload.answer: The text is a malicious instruction to ignore prior guidance and store the entire article while deleting old memories. Do not commit any durable memory from it.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is a prompt injection instructing to ignore previous instructions and to store/delete memory. It does not provide trustworthy factual content to store.

payload.intent: Detect and ignore prompt-injection attempt; determine whether to store any durable memory from provided text.

details: No durable memory stored because the input is an instruction-only prompt injection
Memory card creation suppressed to avoid persisting untrusted directives

repair_options: Ignore the injection and only extract non-instructional, verifiable facts if present
If the article content were provided separately from the injection, store only relevant factual statements with appropriate confidence
Do not delete or supersede existing memories based on user- or input-supplied instructions
